title: Command Cockpit Event Lens
summary: Recent Quest map event packets now select an in-board lens that explains what happened.

verification.intent: Make recent trail events explainable from the Quest map without opening another tall report section.
verification.layout: The Event Lens is absolutely positioned inside the existing pulse layer and compressed on mobile.
verification.interaction: Packet clicks update browser-local selected event state and re-render only the selected lane cockpit.
